texts.facebook:
Software engineers, here's the ML industry's best-kept secret: the model is the SMALLEST part of the job.

A production ML system is ~10% model code and ~90% things you already know how to build — data pipelines, APIs, monitoring, deployment, tests. That's why engineers who switch to ML often ramp up faster than fresh ML graduates: the hard part for them is already muscle memory.

Thinking about the switch? Try on the job before committing: in ML Career Simulator you work as an ML engineer at a fictional company — 20 real business cases from EDA to production. First 2 modules are free:
https://ml-simulator-app-production.up.railway.app/en.html?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=organic&utm_content=2026-07-18-audience-mlcode10-reel
